query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_games,
       SUM(CASE WHEN awayBookSpread IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_lines,
       SUM(CASE WHEN awayModelSpread IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_projections
FROM games
WHERE sport = 'NCAAM' AND gameDate = '2026-03-19';

       SUM(CASE WHEN awayModelSpread IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_projections
